About

From the sales floor to the spreadsheet

I spent close to a decade talking to customers, tracking targets, and watching what actually moves a small business — first as a sales associate, then as a sales specialist at the Egyptian Food Bank. That's where I got curious about the numbers behind the counter.

I taught myself Excel, Power BI, SQL and Python to answer that curiosity properly, and started building the kind of dashboards I always wished I'd had on the shop floor: clear KPIs, real trends, and reports that a manager can actually act on. I've since taken that further and built a complete Google Apps Script system that a real electrical shop runs its daily sales and inventory on.

What I bring that most junior analysts don't: real retail and customer-ops experience. I don't just chart the data — I've stood behind the register it came from, so I know which numbers a manager actually checks every morning.

Selected Work

Projects

One production system in daily use, plus three analytics dashboards covering retail, e-commerce and call-center operations.

Electrical Shop Management System
"الأنوار للأدوات الكهربائية" — live production app, 2026
Google Apps Script Google Sheets HTML/CSS/JS
  • Built a full web-based management system for a retail electrical shop using Google Apps Script with Google Sheets as the backend — no server costs, no manual paper tracking.
  • Designed two role-based login interfaces: an Owner/Manager dashboard with real-time KPIs, and a Cashier point-of-sale screen for daily operations.
  • Built the full point-of-sale flow — cashiers log sales and expenses, and the system instantly generates a printable, itemized customer receipt.
  • Added complete inventory management (add/edit/delete, category filters, low-stock warnings) and a categorized expense log.

Sales Overview Dashboard
Multi-page retail sales analytics — Excel, Power BI, SQL, Python, 2026
Power BI SQL Excel / Python
  • End-to-end sales analytics dashboard with a relational data model, built to track performance across region, branch, category and salesperson.
  • YTD vs YAGO and MTD vs Target KPI panels, plus a live daily sales trend chart by year, month and day.
  • Dedicated Region Performance page with an expandable matrix down to region → branch → month.
  • Product Review and Business Review pages with decomposition trees for drilling into MTD growth by product and branch.
